name: Citizens State Bank
description_short: Community-focused bank offering personal and business checking, savings, loans, and investment products with emphasis on relationship banking and personalized service.
description_long:
Citizens State Bank is a community bank chartered 112 years ago, currently serving the greater Detroit, Michigan area including a recently opened Farmington Hills location. The bank positions itself as a hybrid institution combining the technology and product breadth of large national banks with the personalized service and relationship focus of a small community bank. They serve both personal and business customers with a range of deposit accounts, lending products, and specialized services.

The bank offers comprehensive banking services including checking and savings accounts, money market accounts, IRAs, personal and business loans, HELOCs, mortgage products, and specialized services like Money Service Business accounts with armored cash courier services. They provide modern digital banking through their SmartBank online platform, mobile deposit, bill pay, and 24/7 account access. Their commercial lending includes portfolio loans and customized credit solutions. They also offer fraud protection tools like Positive Pay for business customers.

Citizens State Bank differentiates itself through awards recognition (Best Bank in Detroit Free Press Community Choice Awards for 2021, 2023, and 2024; Forbes & Fortunes Best in Banking in Michigan), emphasis on relationship banking where customers can have direct access to their banker, and custom-tailored loan solutions rather than standardized products. The bank operates as privately-owned, which they claim gives them an entrepreneurial perspective. Multiple customer testimonials highlight the loan process simplicity and personalized service quality.

The bank serves a regional Michigan market with multiple branches and has demonstrated growth through new location expansion. However, as a regional community bank, they lack the nationwide branch network of major national banks, and service availability is geographically limited to Michigan. The website provides limited specific information about account fees, interest rates, loan terms, and minimum deposit requirements, requiring customers to contact the bank directly for detailed product specifications. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Money Market accounts with high yields
Personal loans and lines of credit
Mortgage lending (home purchase, refinance, portfolio loans)
Business loans and customized commercial credit
Money Service Business accounts with armored cash courier services
Mobile deposit and mobile banking app
pros: Award-winning service: Named Best Bank in Community Choice Awards by Detroit Free Press for 2021, 2023, and 2024
Personalized relationship banking: Direct access to banker's cell phone and customized loan solutions rather than standardized products
Comprehensive product suite: Full range of personal and business accounts, loans, mortgages, and investment products rivaling larger banks
Modern digital banking: Free 24/7 online banking, mobile deposit, bill pay, and SmartBank platform
Specialized business services: Money Service Business accounts with armored cash courier services and customized commercial credit solutions
Long-term stability: 112-year operating history with commitment to serve community for generations
Featured in major publications: Forbes & Fortunes Best in Banking in Michigan recognition
cons: Limited geographic availability: Regional Michigan-only bank with fewer branches than national competitors
Vague pricing information: Website lacks specific details on fees, interest rates, minimum deposits, and loan terms
No rate comparison data: Cannot assess competitiveness against national banks without contacting directly
Small bank limitations: As a regional bank, may have less sophisticated technology infrastructure than major national institutions
Customer service accessibility: Relationship-dependent model may not suit customers who prefer self-service banking
best_for: Michigan-based business owners seeking customized lending and personalized relationship banking
Local consumers prioritizing face-to-face service and direct access to their banker over convenience
Money Service Businesses needing armored cash courier services and specialized account solutions
Borrowers with unique financing needs who value portfolio loans tailored to individual circumstances
diagnosis: Citizens State Bank is best for Michigan-based customers and businesses prioritizing personalized relationship banking and willing to work with a regional bank rather than a national institution. The main caveat is geographic limitation to Michigan and the need to contact the bank directly for specific rates, fees, and terms since the website provides limited pricing transparency.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
